name: Fukutome Meat Packers, Ltd.
summary: Fukutome Meat Packers, Ltd. processes, manufactures, and sells meat, and frozen and cooked foods in Japan. The company offers pork, sausages, hams, bacons, and beef. It also manages restaurants; and retails meat side dishes. The company was founded in 1918 and is headquartered in Hiroshima, Japan.
